ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the client account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the client organization */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the domain name */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who will receive the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., expiration, flagged) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the alert has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the domain name */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who performed the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., renewal, purchase, transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in USD */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)
